a.xlink:title: Base class for abstract GLSL includes.
Base class for different kinds of non-linear image transformations.
Non-templated base class of MultiIncludable to implement polymorphic interface.
Base interface for implementing polymorphic image masks using OpenGL.
Inherit from this class if your class should be neither copy-constructible nor assignable.
The GlDenseDeformation class represents dense deformations based on a displacement map.
Deformation model based on flattening a tracking sequence.
Base interface for a parametric deformation in 2D or 3D.
The FreeFormDeformation provides deformations using a free-form deformation (FFD) based on B-splines.
The GlTPSDeformation class provides deformations using a thin-plate splines (TPS).
Concrete type for an instance of a Multi-AbstractInclude.
Simple axis-aligned cropping mask with optional roundness.
An ExplicitIntensityMask is a combination of an ExplicitMask and an IntensityMask.
An ExplicitMask holds an individual mask value for every pixel.
Masks pixels with a specific value or values outside a specific range.
Basic mask where only every N-th pixel is considered inside.
